zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：窄幅高位震荡偏多
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持在1700附近窄幅震荡，短期结构偏多但动能放缓，价格仍运行于20日均线上方，整体趋势保持温和上行格局。

MACD指标持续为正值24.77，显示多头动能仍占优，但信号线缺失使得趋势确认略不完整，RSI缺失下需结合价格结构判断强弱分界。

下方关键支撑位关注1659附近20日均线，其次1680短线支撑仍有效，上方阻力集中于1700及1725区域，突破需成交量配合确认有效。

短线建议围绕1690至1705区间高抛低吸，若放量突破1700可顺势跟多，跌破1659则需谨慎控制仓位并关注回撤风险严格执行。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently consolidating in a very narrow intraday range around 1696, reflecting market indecision after a mild -0.11% daily change. Price action remains compressed between the session low near 1695.7 and high at 1700.1, indicating low volatility and equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite the flat movement, the broader structure remains slightly constructive as price holds above the 20-period SMA at 1659.19, suggesting underlying bullish resilience.

Momentum indicators present a neutral-to-slightly bullish picture. The MACD reading at 24.77397 remains positive, implying that upward momentum has not fully dissipated, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation strength. With RSI unavailable, price behavior becomes more important, and current compression suggests neither overbought nor oversold conditions. Overall momentum is fading but still favors cautious upside continuation if volume expands.

Key support and resistance levels are tightly defined due to the recent consolidation. Immediate support is located at 1695.7, followed by a psychological and structural cushion around 1680. A deeper support zone aligns with the 20-SMA near 1659.19. On the upside, initial resistance is positioned at 1700.1, with a breakout above this level opening potential toward 1720 and beyond if momentum strengthens.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound approach until a decisive breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near support around 1695–1690 with tight risk controls, targeting quick rotations toward 1700 resistance. Conversely, rejection at 1700 could offer short scalp opportunities. A confirmed break and hold above 1700.1 would signal renewed bullish momentum, while a loss of 1680 would shift bias toward a corrective phase toward the 1659 SMA region.
